requests.text: First monster is live: monsters/poring/ (48x48, low top-down, 8 dirs). Read monsters/poring/monster.json — it maps every rotation + animation frame/strip/gif. Animations: jump + attack (8 dirs x 16 frames). NOTE animation_aliases: {"walk": "jump"} — the poring hops instead of walking, so use jump frames for locomotion. Maintainer wants it added to the game.

Second monster live: monsters/lava_poring/ — a black/lava variant of the poring (48x48, low top-down, 8 dirs; jump + flame attack at 8 dirs x 6 frames; walk aliased to jump). Same monster.json contract as poring. Good candidate for a tougher poring tier.

Third monster live: monsters/ice_poring/ — an ice variant of the poring (48x48, low top-down, 8 dirs; jump 8x16 frames + magic-ice attack 8x6 frames; walk aliased to jump). Same monster.json contract. The poring family is now normal/lava/ice — animation keys are uniform (jump/attack) across all three.

Fourth monster live: monsters/forest_poring/ — a green forest variant of the poring (48x48, low top-down, 8 dirs; jump 8x16 frames + projectile-vomit attack 8x6 frames; walk aliased to jump). Same monster.json contract, same uniform jump/attack keys. Poring family: normal/lava/ice/forest.

MONSTER ROSTER SYNCED — the poring family is now 6 and every monster has 3 animations. Folders: poring, lava_poring, forest_poring, sand_poring, water_poring, ice_poring (all 48x48, low top-down, 8 dirs). Each monster.json now carries CANONICAL keys jump/attack/die (8 dirs each) + animation_aliases {walk:jump}. Two changes to note: (1) NEW die animation on all 6 (melts/dissolves & disappears) — use for death. (2) ice_poring was RE-POINTED to a new 'ice & snow' object (old id 10046ec1 retired) — same folder name, new art + a die anim. New members sand_poring + water_poring. Authoritative list is monsters/config/roster.json; run monsters/pipeline/sync.py to reconcile.
